title: Leveraged tokens on Hyperliquid ft. Bouncetech
summary_title: Bounce Tech: Non-liquidating leveraged tokens on Hyperliquid
summary_description: How leverage tokens work, why they outperform perps in rallies, and why Hyperliquid's infrastructure makes them possible.

key_moments.label: Host introduces Bounce Tech team and space begins
Louis and Max introduce themselves and their background with TLX
Core explanation: what are leveraged tokens and how do they rebalance
Key advantage: no liquidation risk, but volatility decay in sideways markets
Why Hyperliquid EVM precompiles made this product possible
DeFi composability: delta-neutral pools and tax-efficient funding strategies
HIP3 markets coming soon with higher possible leverage for commodities
Closing: points campaign confirmed, token planned, six-month and two-year roadmap
